title: Senior Platform Engineer
score_reasoning: Your backend foundation in Python, Go, Docker, and AWS aligns well with the infrastructure and platform aspects of this role. However, the job heavily emphasizes Kubernetes (2+ years required), which is a confirmed critical gap in your CV—you have only basic Docker experience. The Tel Aviv location with hybrid setup centered on-site creates a major location mismatch: you are Berlin-based, remote-first, and the role specifies hybrid work in Tel Aviv (5+ hour timezone difference, cross-border, and requires physical office presence). This falls well below your stated location and work setup constraints. While the Platform Engineer title is adjacent to your backend track record and the company (Via) carries meaningful brand value in transportation tech, the location constraint alone makes this role impractical for your current setup.

red_flags: Kubernetes is a primary requirement (2+ years) but you have only basic Docker experience—significant tech gap
On-site hybrid role based in Tel Aviv; you are Berlin-based with remote-first preference
5+ hour timezone mismatch (Tel Aviv UTC+2/+3 vs Berlin UTC+1/+2)
Platform engineering is adjacent to your core backend focus; lower seniority than senior backend engineer
